name: io.github.frangelbarrera/osint-agent-skills
description: OSINT MCP server — 23 tools: DNS, WHOIS, Shodan, breaches, GEOINT, crypto. Works with Claude Code.

tools.name: dns_lookup
tools.description: Resolve DNS records for a domain via Google DoH

tools.name: crt_sh_search
tools.description: Certificate Transparency log search via crt.sh

tools.name: wayback_cdx
tools.description: Query Internet Archive Wayback CDX index

tools.name: wayback_save
tools.description: Save a URL to the Wayback Machine

tools.name: shodan_internetdb
tools.description: Free Shodan InternetDB host profile lookup

tools.name: ipinfo_lookup
tools.description: IP geolocation and ASN via ipinfo.io

tools.name: hibp_breach_check
tools.description: Check if email appears in HaveIBeenPwned breaches

tools.name: gravatar_lookup
tools.description: Look up Gravatar profile from email address

tools.name: shodan_host_lookup
tools.description: Full Shodan host lookup (requires API key)

tools.name: hunter_email_finder
tools.description: Find email addresses for a domain via Hunter.io

tools.name: mastodon_user_lookup
tools.description: Mastodon user lookup across the fediverse
